title: lachemilla pinnata
intro: Lachemilla pinnata, also known as rock cinquefoil, is a flowering perennial plant native to the mountainous regions of Europe and Asia. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which make it useful in treating wounds and skin conditions. The plant's leaves and roots have been used to treat a range of health issues, including digestive problems and respiratory ailments, due to its expectorant and antispasmodic properties. Lachemilla pinnata can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion for use in herbal medicine.
